# GitHub Issue Templates

This directory contains templates for creating consistent issues on the SeedWOC repository.

## Using Issue Templates

When creating a new issue on GitHub, you'll be prompted to choose a template based on the issue type.

### Available Templates

1. **Bug Report** - Found something that's broken
2. **Feature Request** - Have an idea for improvement
3. **Documentation Issue** - Problems or gaps in docs
4. **Exercise Request** - Suggest a new exercise
5. **General Question** - Ask about anything

## Creating an Issue

1. Go to [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/seedwoc/seedwoc/issues)
2. Click "New Issue"
3. Select the appropriate template
4. Fill in all required fields
5. Submit

### Before Creating an Issue

- [ ] Check if issue already exists
- [ ] Search keywords in existing issues
- [ ] Read FAQ.md for common questions
- [ ] Provide clear, specific information

---

For more help, see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../docs/CONTRIBUTING.md)
